author: Viggo Meesters
description: Inspect .zip archive contents as read-only metadata trees with search and safety warnings. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Viggo Meesters
manifest.description: Inspect .zip archive contents as read-only metadata trees with search and safety warnings.
manifest.name: Archive Viewer

name: Archive Viewer

releases.author: viggomeesters
releases.description:
Initial release of Archive Viewer.

- Read-only .zip metadata viewer for Obsidian.
- Contents tree, summary, search/filter, refresh, and entry metadata table.
- Safety warnings for path traversal, absolute paths, hidden/system-looking paths, many-file archives, large metadata, and suspicious compression ratios.
- No extraction, contained-file opening, network, clipboard, subprocess, or write-back behavior.
